spec_match.rationale: The checklist now generates the current destination manifest, old-origin association file, and optional old manifest using migrate_from, allow_migration, migrate_to, behavior, and install_url.

interactive.rationale: Chrome DevTools MCP on Chrome 148 exercised the form inputs, behavior selector, authorization and redirect/install_url toggles, and Validate button across valid and blocked cases.

blurb_alignment.rationale: The page lede and feature index card now promise the same live same-site, HTTPS, bare-origin, authorization, behavior, and redirect-safe install_url checks the UI performs.

edge_cases.rationale: The verified cases include cross-site, same-origin, path/query, missing allow_migration, invalid behavior, redirected old routes without install_url, malformed URL, and force-with-redirect success.

references.rationale: The page cites the correct ChromeStatus feature plus WICG and Chrome for Developers references for migrate_from processing.

design_system.rationale: Static and runtime checks found no raw hex colors, inline style attributes, inline event handlers, or stale migration field names.

summary: Repaired and rechecked with chrome-devtools-mcp on Chrome 148. The checklist now uses the current manifest-incubations origin migration contract and generated JSON, and console/network stayed clean during all validated cases.
